title: metastelma trichophyllum
intro: Metastelma trichophyllum is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as a type of milkweed vine due to its milky latex. The medicinal properties of Metastelma trichophyllum lie in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. It has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Metastelma trichophyllum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, with the leaves and stems being the primary parts used for medicinal purposes.
